title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
title_es: Google lanza TPUs especializados para la era de agentes IA
bajada: Google presentó la octava generación de sus TPUs con dos chips especializados diseñados para potenciar agentes de IA en producción. Esta infraestructura compite directamente con NVIDIA en el mercado de chips para IA empresarial.
bajada_en: Google unveiled the eighth generation of its TPUs with two specialized chips designed to power AI agents in production. This infrastructure directly competes with NVIDIA in the enterprise AI chip market.

title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.
title_es: Google invierte miles de millones en Thinking Machines Lab
bajada: El lab de Mira Murati ha cerrado un acuerdo multimillonario con Google Cloud para infraestructura IA usando chips GB300 de NVIDIA. El trato refleja la apuesta de Google por talento independiente en IA generativa.
bajada_en: Mira Murati's lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure using NVIDIA's GB300 chips. The deal reflects Google's bet on independent AI talent.

title: Anthropic’s most dangerous AI model just fell into the wrong hands
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model, a powerful cybersecurity tool that the company said could be dangerous in the wrong hands, has been accessed by a "small group of unauthorized users," Bloomberg reports. An unnamed member of the group, identified only as "a third-party contractor for Anthropic," told the publication that members of a private online forum […]
title_es: Modelo Mythos de Anthropic fue accedido sin autorización
bajada: El modelo de ciberseguridad Mythos de Anthropic, clasificado como peligroso, fue comprometido por un pequeño grupo de usuarios no autorizados. El incidente plantea preguntas sobre seguridad en herramientas sensibles de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model, classified as dangerous, was compromised by unauthorized users. The incident raises questions about security in sensitive AI tools.

title: NVIDIA and Google Cloud Collaborate to Advance Agentic and Physical AI
summary: NVIDIA and Google Cloud have collaborated for more than a decade, co‑engineering a full‑stack AI platform that spans every technology layer — from performance‑optimized libraries and frameworks to enterprise‑grade cloud services.  This foundation enables developers, startups and enterprises to push agentic and physical AI out of the lab and into production — from agents that […]
title_es: NVIDIA y Google Cloud colaboran en IA agéntica y física
bajada: Las dos compañías refuerzan su colaboración de más de una década con una plataforma full-stack que permite a developers pasar agentes de IA de laboratorio a producción. La alianza cubre desde librerías optimizadas hasta servicios cloud empresariales.
bajada_en: The two companies strengthen their decade-long collaboration with a full-stack platform enabling developers to move AI agents from lab to production. The alliance covers everything from optimized libraries to enterprise cloud services.

title: Google Announces New TPUs for Training and Inference
summary: Google announced the first versions of its AI chips that are specialized for training and inference, expanding its competition with Nvidia.The search giant unveiled the new versions of its tensor processing units on Wednesday at the start of its annual Google Cloud Next conference. The event ...
title_es: Google anuncia TPUs especializados para training e inferencia
bajada: Google amplía su cartera de chips con versiones especializadas para entrenamiento e inferencia, intensificando la competencia con NVIDIA. Los nuevos TPUs fueron presentados en Google Cloud Next.
bajada_en: Google expands its chip portfolio with specialized versions for training and inference, intensifying competition with NVIDIA. The new TPUs were announced at Google Cloud Next.

title: OpenAI’s updated image generator can now pull information from the web
summary: OpenAI is rolling out the latest version of its AI-powered image generator with new "thinking capabilities," allowing it to search the web to help it create multiple images from a single prompt. On Tuesday, OpenAI announced that ChatGPT Images 2.0 can now create more "sophisticated" images, with improvements to its ability to follow instructions, preserve […]
title_es: ChatGPT Images 2.0 ahora busca en la web para generar imágenes
bajada: OpenAI lanzó la versión 2.0 de su generador de imágenes con capacidad de búsqueda web y "thinking". La herramienta crea múltiples imágenes sofisticadas desde un único prompt.
bajada_en: OpenAI released version 2.0 of its image generator with web search and "thinking" capabilities. The tool creates multiple sophisticated images from a single prompt.

title: OpenClaw Struggles to Grow Up After Overnight Success
summary: OpenClaw, the AI agent software that took the tech world by storm, is reckoning with a difficult choice: whether to transition from an experimental hacker project to a sustainable tool companies can reliably use.One of the fastest-growing open-source software projects ever, OpenClaw is still managed by a group of volunteers who are trying to keep up with the technical and logistical demands of a fast-changing new product category while hewing to the collaborative, experimental spirit that got it started.
title_es: OpenClaw enfrenta reto de transición de proyecto hacker a herramienta empresarial
bajada: El proyecto open-source de agentes IA que explotó en popularidad lucha ahora por profesionalizarse manteniendo su espíritu colaborativo. El equipo de voluntarios enfrenta demandas técnicas y logísticas sin precedentes.
bajada_en: The open-source AI agent project that exploded in popularity is now struggling to professionalize while maintaining its collaborative spirit. The volunteer team faces unprecedented technical and logistical demands.

title: Tencent, Alibaba in Talks to Invest in DeepSeek at $20 Billion-Plus Valuation
summary: Chinese tech giants Tencent Holdings and Alibaba Group are in talks to invest in DeepSeek, the AI upstart that recently started fundraising for the first time, according to four people with knowledge of the conversations.DeepSeek, owned by Chinese hedge fund High-Flyer Capital Management, is now seeking to raise funding at a valuation of more than $20 billion, after its initial discussions with prospective investors generated immense interests, one of the people said.The Information reported on Fridaythat DeepSeek started talks to raise outside capital for the first time, targeting to raise at least $300 million at a valuation of at least $10 billion.
title_es: Tencent y Alibaba invierten en DeepSeek a valuación de $20B
bajada: Los gigantes tecnológicos chinos están en conversaciones para invertir en DeepSeek, elevando su valuación a más de $20 mil millones. Es la primera ronda de financiación externa del startup chino de IA.
bajada_en: Chinese tech giants are in talks to invest in DeepSeek, raising its valuation to over $20 billion. It's the startup's first external funding round.

title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
summary: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.
title_es: Meta grabará keystrokes de empleados para entrenar IA
bajada: Meta implementará una herramienta interna que convierte movimientos de mouse y clics en datos para entrenar modelos IA. La práctica plantea implicaciones de privacidad en el desarrollo interno de IA.
bajada_en: Meta will implement an internal tool converting mouse movements and clicks into data for training AI models. The practice raises privacy implications for internal AI development.

title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
summary: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.
title_es: Google Ads Advisor añade tres nuevas capacidades de seguridad
bajada: Google mejora su herramienta de publicidad con nuevas funciones IA para mayor seguridad y velocidad. Las actualizaciones serán presentadas en Google Marketing Live.
bajada_en: Google enhances its advertising tool with new AI-powered features for better security and speed. Updates will be announced at Google Marketing Live.

title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
summary: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.
title_es: Google Maps incorpora IA generativa en su plataforma
bajada: Google está integrando capacidades de IA generativa en Maps para mejorar la experiencia de usuarios. La actualización representa la expansión de IA en productos core de Google.
bajada_en: Google is integrating generative AI capabilities into Maps to enhance user experience. The update represents the expansion of AI across Google's core products.

title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This start-up wants to figure out which ones matter.
summary: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.
title_es: 10x Science recauda $4.8M para validar fármacos generados por IA
bajada: El startup levantó capital semilla para ayudar farmacéuticos a identificar moléculas prometedoras entre miles de candidatos generados por IA. La herramienta aborda el cuello de botella en descubrimiento de drogas.
bajada_en: The startup raised seed funding to help pharmaceutical researchers identify promising molecules from thousands of AI-generated candidates. The tool addresses a bottleneck in drug discovery.

title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 271 Bugs in Firefox
summary: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.
title_es: Mozilla usó Mythos para encontrar y corregir 271 bugs en Firefox
bajada: El equipo de Firefox empleó el modelo de ciberseguridad Mythos de Anthropic para identificar vulnerabilidades. El caso demuestra aplicaciones prácticas de IA en seguridad de software.
bajada_en: Firefox team used Anthropic's Mythos model to identify vulnerabilities. The case demonstrates practical applications of AI in software security.

title: CrabTrap: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production
title_es: Brex abre CrabTrap: proxy HTTP para asegurar agentes IA
bajada: Brex lanzó CrabTrap, una herramienta open-source que usa LLMs como jueces para securizar agentes en producción. La solución aborda un problema crítico en deployment de agentes IA.
bajada_en: Brex launched CrabTrap, an open-source tool using LLMs as judges to secure agents in production. The solution addresses a critical challenge in AI agent deployment.

title: The Pope’s Warnings About AI Were AI-Generated, a Detection Tool Claims
summary: Pangram Labs’ updated Chrome extension puts warning labels on AI slop as you scroll your social feeds.
title_es: Herramienta detecta tweets del Papa que fueron generados por IA
bajada: La extensión Chrome de Pangram Labs identificó contenido generado por IA en redes sociales, advirtiendo sobre "AI slop". La herramienta ayuda a identificar contenido sintético en feeds.
bajada_en: Pangram Labs' Chrome extension identified AI-generated content on social media, warning about "AI slop". The tool helps detect synthetic content in feeds.
